mapper.select:
select *
from warehouse
where status=1
order by warehouse_id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into warehouse ( warehouse_code, warehouse_name, location, capacity, manager_name, remark, status )
values ( #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{location}, #{capacity}, #{managerName}, #{remark}, 1 )
mapper.update:
update warehouse
set
warehouse_code=#{warehouseCode},
warehouse_name=#{warehouseName},
location=#{location},
capacity=#{capacity},
manager_name=#{managerName},
remark=#{remark},
update_time=now()
where warehouse_id=#{warehouseId}
